channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
item.description: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

item.title: Charlie Kirk’s legacy is a 30-year sentence for moving zines
item.description: Just days after a gunman killed conservative activist Charlie Kirk, it became clear that President Donald Trump would use the assassination to fuel a crackdown on free speech. To avenge Kirk's...

item.title: Microsoft introduces cheaper Surface devices with half the memory
item.description: Microsoft just added a cheaper 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop to its lineup. Both models come equipped with 8GB of RAM instead of 16GB, costing $849 for the specced-down Surface...

item.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this U.S. company
item.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

item.title: Your @EventListener Fires Before the Transaction Commits⚙️
item.description: Your domain event fires. Your notification service queries the DB for the entity that just got saved. It finds nothing. You add a log line. It starts working. You remove the log. It breaks again....

item.title: Building a Real-Time World Cup 2026 Bracket Predictor with Vanilla JS and GitHub Actions
item.description: Introduction With the World Cup 2026 group stage reaching its climax, football fans worldwide are speculating about who will make it to the finals. To make this experience interactive, I built a...

item.title: A24 Knows You’re Mad About the Google AI Collab
item.description: Indie movie fans are upset about Google DeepMind’s $75 million investment in the studio, which comes as AI companies are deepening their influence in Hollywood.

item.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
item.description: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.

item.title: How Be Recommended by Inithouse Scores AI Visibility 0 to 100 Across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Gemini
item.description: Your product might rank on page one of Google and still be invisible to AI. When someone asks ChatGPT "what's the best project management tool for small teams," does your product show up? For most...

item.title: I Built a Messenger That Works Without the Internet — And It Changed How I Think About Privacy
item.description: A quiet experiment in Bluetooth, offline communication, and why we gave up too much when we handed our conversations to the cloud. The last time I was truly unreachable, I was in a place with no...

item.title: How to Get Your First Tool Online
item.description: TL;DR - A finished app that only runs on one laptop is a private demo. Getting it online means connecting three things: a place to store the code (version control), a place to run it (a host), and...

item.title: RAG vs Agentic AI: A Developer's Decision Tree (With Code Examples for Both)
item.description: Two different problems wearing similar clothes. Here's how to tell them apart in thirty seconds, with working code for both. I see this confusion in almost every project kickoff: "We need RAG"...

item.title: A new paper argues Microsoft exaggerated its quantum claims a year ago
item.description: A critique published in Nature Wednesday calls the basic technology behind Microsoft's "breakthrough" quantum computing chip the Majorana 1 into question. Microsoft unveiled the chip in February...

item.title: Autoscaling Is an Authority System, Not a Capacity System
item.description: Autoscaling authority is the condition most cloud operations teams have never formally defined. Every organization running Kubernetes has autoscaling configured. Almost none has treated those...

item.title: Python library to bypass Cloudflare/G captcha v2 LOCALLY
item.description: Real world example Site name is hidden import asyncio from pylcaptcha.http import BrowserHTTP async def main(imei_number: str): async with BrowserHTTP() as protocol: await...

item.title: Making DSPy reliable: self-correcting, schema-validated LLM outputs with automatic prompt optimization
item.description: I got tired of babysitting LLM prompts, so I built a small open source tool to stop. The pattern that wore me down: every LLM call in a real agent needs a wrapper. Parse the JSON, catch the field...

item.title: How We Made Ktor JSON Parsing 66% Faster with 50% Less Memory on KMP
item.description: If you are building Kotlin Multiplatform applications, you know that JSON serialization is often one of the main bottlenecks in high-throughput backends and mobile apps—especially regarding CPU...

item.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
item.description: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

item.title: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
item.description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary for a major defense bill, but denies it was used for the bill text itself and says "NO Legislation is...

item.title: I Met With China’s Top AI Experts. They’re Freaking Out, Too
item.description: The AI arms race between China and the US has researchers on both sides worried about a “Chernobyl moment.”

item.title: GTA VI is a worrying sign for the future of physical games
item.description: Rockstar Games has finally given Grand Theft Auto VI a price ahead of the game's November 19th launch. But while announcing that the game would cost $79.99, Rockstar also confirmed that the...

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its second day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11...

item.title: Google is finally opening the Play Store to outside payments
item.description: While the court still hasn't signed off on the massive settlement resolving Epic's antitrust lawsuit against Google for having a monopoly over Android's app store with Google Play, the tech giant...

item.title: Prime Day deals under $50 that are really worth it
item.description: If you’re looking for a good deal without spending hundreds, Prime Day discounts have pushed some of our favorite products under $50. You can pick up everything from Nintendo Switch games to...

item.title: The $27 million Al proxy war over Alex Bores ends in a draw
item.description: The expensive, $27 million political proxy war between Anthropic and OpenAI came to a draw last night when Alex Bores, a New York state Assemblyman whose popularity surged after being targeted by...

item.title: CISA Warns Critical Lantronix EDS5000 Flaw Is Being Actively Exploited
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday warned of active exploitation of a critical security flaw impacting Lantronix EDS5000 Series devices, urging Federal...

item.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
item.description: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

item.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
item.description: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

item.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
item.description: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

item.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
